items.name: Spicy Pasta Toss
items.description: Your weekday pasta with Todun’s signature kick. Cook your pasta and set aside. In a pan, sauté veggies in Ororo Todun Pepper Oil. Stir in Ata Todun Pepper Sauce and toss pasta until coated. A quick, comforting dish that proves spice makes everything better.
items.simplified_description: A spicy pasta dish with vegetables and special sauces.

items.name: Todun’s Pepper Eggs (Breakfast with a Kick)
items.description: Your mornings just got exciting! Eggs meet heat in this smoky, spicy twist on a classic breakfast. How to use: Heat a spoon of Ororo Todun Pepper Oil in a pan. Fry onions, add whisked eggs, and stir in half a spoon of Ata Todun Pepper Sauce. Cook till fluffy and fragrant. Put some cheese on top if you love cheese. Perfect with toasted bread, plantain, or yam — pure Naija comfort in every bite.
items.simplified_description: Spicy scrambled eggs with onions and optional cheese.

items.name: Spicy Pepper Shrimp Stir-Fry
items.description: Turn up the heat with a quick, flavorful stir-fry. Juicy shrimp tossed in Ata Todun Pepper Sauce and a drizzle of Ororo Todun Pepper Oil — smoky, spicy, and ready in minutes. Sauté onions and bell peppers in Ororo Todun Pepper Oil. Add cleaned shrimp and a spoonful of Ata Todun Pepper Sauce. Stir-fry for 5–7 minutes until glossy and cooked through. Sprinkle some parsley on top to serve. Serve with steamed rice or noodles — bold, fiery, and full of love.
items.simplified_description: A spicy shrimp stir-fry with vegetables and special sauces.
